figures.caption: Fig. 4: Algorithm 4.2 compared to MC for T = 4 years using 4 qubits (left) and 8 qubits (right).

Fig. 3: Algorithm 4.2 compared to MC for T = 2 years using 4 qubits (left) and 8 qubits (right). A clear difference in the first plot indicates discretization error; finer discretization improves agreement with the benchmark.
Fig. 2: Algorithm 4.1 compared to MC for T = 4 years using 4 qubits (left) and 8 qubits (right). Error seems to accumulate through the years.

Fig. 1: Algorithm 4.1 compared to MC for T = 2 years using 4 qubits (left) and 8 qubits (right). A clear difference in the first plot indicates discretization error; finer discretization improves agreement with the benchmark.
